summary: Archived the prior baseline into a date-stamped snapshot, removed root tmp/runtime residue, rebaselined active runtime on full_rebuild, and verified buyer packet and customer pack evidence paths.

validation.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/codex_python.ps1 scripts/run_ocp420_one_click_runtime.py "manifests + data/gold_candidate_books/full_rebuild + data/wiki_runtime_books/full_rebuild + data/wiki_relations + data/wiki_assets + reports/build_logs" "one-click runtime rebaselined and smoke passes"

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/codex_python.ps1 scripts/verify_buyer_packet_surface.py "src/play_book_studio/app + presentation-ui + reports/build_logs" "buyer packet surface stays aligned with active truth"

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/codex_python.ps1 scripts/verify_customer_pack_evidence.py "src/play_book_studio/intake + reports/build_logs" "customer pack evidence remains available"
